name: Almond Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the onion in butter until tender.
2. In a small bowl, beat together the eggs, half-and-half, milk, flour, and white pepper until lightly frothy.
3. Stir in the cooked onions, cheese, and toasted sliced almonds until well mixed.
4. Pour the mixture into the hot baked pie shell.
5. Bake at 325°F for about 45 minutes. A knife inserted into the center will come out clean when done.
6. Let stand for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
